title: Perceptron Apparatus
description: A physical computational device that performs artificial neural network calculations through mechanical manipulation---an "abacus for deep learning". The project combines digital fabrication tooling (laser-cut and CNC-routed SVG generation), machine-learning infrastructure for training and exporting network weights (MNIST digit and poker-hand classifiers), and a browser-based digital twin with interactive widgets. Educational posters and worksheets make the apparatus usable for public engagement and teaching. A Cybernetic Studio (Australian National University) project. Source code is released under the MIT licence; documentation, fabrication designs, and educational materials are released under CC-BY-4.0.
